MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-10-2022 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JAN-10-2022 HEARING HELD RE: PLAINTIFF ANTHONY FERREIRO'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED MOTION IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PLAINTIFF IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING AND A SEPARATE PROPOSED JUDGMENT. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR NO. 8600, EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-24-2022 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-10-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF ANTHONY FERREIRO's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment" is granted.

Counsel for the plaintiff is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and a separate proposed judgment.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
